subject: [PATCH v5 17/18] selftests/mm: add userfaultfd RWP tests

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd read-write-protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel selftest suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including asynchronous and synchronous modes, page mapping, memory protection, and fork operations. They verify that RWP works correctly in different situations, such as when pages are touched, accessed, or protected. The patch includes 11 test cases that run against anonymous, shared memory, and hugetlb memory types. It also ensures that the userfaultfd API returns the expected ioctls bitmask. The tests aim to provide comprehensive coverage for UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT functionality.
